div.p: Log scan from checkpoint_lsn → reconstruct in-flight state
T1 (COMMITTED) → No action needed Changes are durable T2 (ACTIVE) → NEEDS UNDO Transaction was in-flight at crash Follow prev_lsn chain: 350 → 300 → 250
BEGIN record → Add entry to txn_table → status = ACTIVE → first_lsn = record.lsn → last_lsn = record.lsn
UPDATE record → Find txn in table → Update last_lsn = record.lsn → Add page to DirtyPageTable
COMMIT record → Find txn in table → status = COMMITTED → Update last_lsn
ABORT record → Find txn in table → status = ABORTED → Update last_lsn
